assertions.title: App renders correctly at mobile viewport

steps.expected: No horizontal scrollbar, content fits viewport
Content fits viewport, bottom tabs visible
steps.observed: Content fits within 375px viewport, bottom tab bar with all 5 tabs visible at bottom

steps.expected: No horizontal scrollbar, content fits viewport
Content fits viewport, bottom tabs visible
steps.observed: Content fits viewport, bottom tab bar fully visible and usable

assertions.title: Bottom tab navigation fixed at screen bottom

steps.observed: position: fixed, bottom: 0px, left: 0px, right: 0px, z-index: 50, class: 'fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 w-full bg-white border-t border-gray-200 z-50'

steps.expected: Bottom tab bar remains visible at bottom
steps.observed: Bottom tab bar stayed fixed at bottom after scrolling

steps.expected: Tabs visible at bottom of viewport
steps.observed: All 5 tabs visible at bottom of screenshot after scroll

assertions.title: Bottom tab navigation cycles all 5 tabs

steps.expected: Goods page renders with correct content
steps.observed: Goods page renders with 'Goods' heading and 'Product catalog coming soon...' placeholder. URL: /

steps.expected: Football page renders with correct content
steps.observed: Football page renders with 'Football' heading and 'Football matches coming soon...' placeholder. URL: /football. Football tab highlighted.

steps.expected: Basketball page renders with correct content
steps.observed: Basketball page renders with 'Basketball' heading and 'Basketball games coming soon...' placeholder. URL: /basketball. Basketball tab highlighted.

steps.expected: Concert page renders with correct content
steps.observed: Concert page renders with 'Concert' heading and 'Concert events coming soon...' placeholder. URL: /concert. Concert tab highlighted.

steps.expected: My Profile page renders with correct content
steps.observed: My Profile page renders with 'My Profile' heading and 'User profile coming soon...' placeholder. URL: /my. My tab highlighted.

steps.action: Cycle in reverse order: Concert -> Goods -> Basketball -> Football -> My
steps.expected: All tabs navigate correctly in any order
steps.observed: All tabs navigated correctly in reverse order. URLs matched expected routes. No errors.

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 3 passed, 0 failed. All pages render correctly at 375x812 mobile viewport without horizontal scrollbar. Bottom tab navigation is fixed at the bottom (position: fixed, bottom: 0px, z-index: 50) and remains visible while scrolling. All 5 tabs (Goods, Football, Basketball, Concert, My) cycle correctly in any order with proper content and no console errors. Tabs currently show placeholder content which is expected for this milestone.
